speaker: speaker1
text: Good morning . Can I help you ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Good morning . I ’ m here to see Rochelle Davis , the Human Resources Manager .

speaker: speaker1
text: Do you have an appointment with her ?

speaker: speaker2

speaker: speaker1
